---
title: "Reports"
---

This section holds longer-form report drafts that can later be expanded into full evaluator-facing writeups.

## Available Drafts

- [Matching Report Draft](matching-report.qmd)
- [Synthetic Control Report Draft](synthetic-control-report.qmd)

## Drafting Standard

Each report draft should eventually cover:

1. the policy question and target estimand
2. the identification logic
3. data requirements and diagnostics
4. implementation choices
5. interpretation limits
6. a reporting checklist for decision-makers
